Author: Aschy
Name: MinimapPlugin
Punchline: Configurable in-game minimap overlay with entity markers.
Description: Displays a resizable, zoomable minimap overlay using the current zone's game map texture. Shows player position, party members, aetherytes, FATEs, and more. Supports north-up and player-up rotation modes.
Changelog: v1.1.1: Use MapId directly, FileExists fallback textures, full-opacity map rendering, extended debug overlay.
